title: Spark LinkedIn Campaign — Angie Foong Personal
description: Angie Foong personal LinkedIn campaign state. Per-account separation (CHG-0860).
handoffNote: 2026-07-14 21:28 AEST: Ken/Yoda handed Angie personal LinkedIn posting to Aria/Angie. Aria to decide AW6-P1 missed-slot handling and schedule AW6-P2/P3 image generation + posting. Business account remains locked.

cadence.missedSlotRule: Push to next available slot. If slot occupied, skip. Never post late.

pipelineDesign.principle: Draft before slot. Publish at slot. Never draft at publish time.

primary.description: Weekend batch draft — all 3 posts for the week ahead drafted on Saturday, reviewed over weekend

fallback.description: Day-before single-post drafts — only run if batch missed

publish.description: Publish-only crons — post approved+imaged content at slot time. Never draft.

activeTheme.name: Draft — per Aria operational rules
activeTheme.note: Ken personal rules used as draft. Aria refining Angie-specific operational rules.

voice.persona: Angie Foong — first-person, direct, professional, practical
voice.rule: External-facing only. NO mentions of AInchors, Yoda, Nexus, agent names, or platform internals.

AW6-P1.title: What clients actually need (and it is not more tools)
AW6-P1.imagePrompt: A calm shallow shoreline at dawn, the water crystal clear and still, with a single figure standing ankle-deep looking down at their own reflection, soft golden light from the horizon, muted blues and warm golds, editorial landscape photography, clarity and grounding mood. Square 1:1 format, no text, no logos, professional quality.

AW6-P2.title: The slide deck trap
AW6-P2.imagePrompt: A split overhead view of two workspaces: on the left, a designer's desk covered in printed colour swatches, font samples, and half-finished slide layouts with a stressed scattered energy; on the right, the same desk cleared down to a single printed page with a simple handwritten framework, one pen, and a fresh cup of coffee, warm natural side-light, muted palette with the right side warmer and calmer, editorial split-composition photography, focus and clarity mood. Square 1:1 format, no text, no logos, professional quality.

AW6-P3.title: What foundation means in training
AW6-P3.imagePrompt: A wide landscape at dawn, the foreground a stable concrete training room foundation with visible structural beams and rebar, the middle ground a partially-built curriculum framework rising out of it with clean lines and modular sections, the background a calm sky just starting to warm with soft golden light, muted greys and warm sunrise gold, editorial landscape photography, hopeful and grounded mood. Square 1:1 format, no text, no logos, professional quality.

pendingActions: Aria/Angie decide AW6-P1 handling (skip / push / override)
Schedule AW6-P2 Wed 12:00 AEST and AW6-P3 Thu 07:30 AEST
blockedActions: No business-page campaign activities until Marketing Developer Platform approved
